A-abadi-mcsherry-foundations-differentia.relevance-description: Incremental iterative dataflow at scale (differential-dataflow foundations).

A-ansible-challenges-mixed-methods-study.relevance-description: Empirical Ansible user-study anchor (Carreira et al.): 59,157 posts + 20 interviews; validates the Dorc thesis + lists capability gaps.

A-arzt-bodden-reviser-incremental-ifds-i.relevance-description: Incremental IFDS/IDE via clear-and-propagate; re-mined for the ~80% incremental-savings figure (Q3).

A-avgustinov-ql-codeql-ecoop-2016.relevance-description: QL/CodeQL: OO queries over a relational program-fact DB (queryable fact base, Q2).

A-bash-in-the-wild-tosem-2022.relevance-description: Large-scale empirical study of real bash usage/smells/bugs; grounds the corpus-skip-rate spike.

A-biabduction-popl-2009.relevance-description: Compositional per-procedure pre/post inference (Infer's basis); maps to the requires/establishes dependency model.

A-colis-installation-scenarios-tacas-202.relevance-description: Symbolic execution of 27k Debian maintainer scripts; feasibility evidence for MH1.

A-colis-platform-sttt-2022.relevance-description: Platform/engineering view of the CoLiS toolchain end-to-end.

A-colis-specification-of-unix-utilities-.relevance-description: Enumerated FS-effect specs for coreutils — the Tier-B canonical-fact vocabulary, pre-built.

A-cousot-abstract-interpretation-popl-19.relevance-description: Abstract-interpretation foundation. (image-only scan; theory consumed via the SPA textbook.)

A-distefano-scaling-static-analyses-face.relevance-description: Infer/Zoncolan: compositionality = scale; diff-time deployment (0%->70%). Scale + deployment template.

A-dozer-icse-seip-2022.relevance-description: Syscall-altitude insight: command effects observable at the kernel boundary; names task composition as the hard problem.

A-horwitz-reps-binkley-sdg-slicing-topla.relevance-description: PDG/SDG + interprocedural slicing = reachability. Reusable-structure template (Q2).

A-jeannerod-phd-thesis-2021.relevance-description: Master reference: full pipeline parse->AST->feature-tree constraints->decision procedures->corpus analysis. ~250pp OCaml.

A-jensen-moller-tajs-type-analysis-javas.relevance-description: Sound AI of a messy dynamic language (our predicament); recency abstraction; eval->T. Most direct methodological precedent.

A-might-smaragdakis-vanhorn-kcfa-paradox.relevance-description: k-CFA is EXPTIME for closures, polynomial for flat/OO data — so a flat fact-map may afford context-sensitivity.

A-mokhov-build-systems-a-la-carte-icfp-2.relevance-description: Scheduler x Rebuilder factoring; verifying-vs-constructive traces; early cutoff. The skip-thesis unifying theory.

A-moller-schwartzbach-static-program-ana.relevance-description: Anchor textbook: CFG, lattices, dataflow, fixpoints, interprocedural, abstract interpretation — the vocabulary + architecture of the field.

A-morbig-sle-2018.relevance-description: Keystone: how to statically parse POSIX shell despite its eval-time grammar. Direct prior art, OCaml.

A-reps-horwitz-sagiv-ifds-popl-1995.relevance-description: IFDS: precise interprocedural dataflow as realizable-path reachability + tabulation summaries. Engine candidate.

A-salcianu-rinard-purity-vmcai-2005.relevance-description: Purity/side-effect (MOD) analysis; compositional per-method summaries. Mutation-domain template.

A-scholz-souffle-datalog-cc-2016.relevance-description: Datalog->native compiled analysis at scale (queryable fact base, Q2/Q3); re-mined for the memory-wall quantification.

A-smoosh-popl-2020.relevance-description: Executable formal POSIX semantics; catalogues the hazards (set -e, expansion, fields) the analyzer must respect.

A-spall-mitchell-rattle-perfect-dependen.relevance-description: Forward build system: straight-line script, no declared deps, trace file accesses -> 'perfect dependencies'. The load-bearing recovery find.

A-sridharan-andersen-complexity-practice.relevance-description: Andersen points-to is cubic worst-case but near-linear in practice (the 'cubic floor but small-in-practice' point Dorc relies on).

A-sui-xue-svf-cc-2016.relevance-description: Sparse value-flow analysis; Graph/Rules/Solver factoring; mem-region partitioning (sparsity + factoring, Q3).

A-vanhorn-mairson-kcfa-exptime-icfp-2008.relevance-description: Deciding k-CFA is complete for EXPTIME — context-sensitivity is provably exponential; the redline for the context dial.

A-verified-interpreter-shell-vstte-2017.relevance-description: Shell-like interpreter formally verified in Why3 (not Coq). Direct input to 'is a proof assistant justified?'

A-cmu-17355-dataflow-frameworks-2017.relevance-description: Dataflow framework over WHILE3ADDR — clean pedagogy (Aldrich, CMU 17-355, Spring 2017). Learning path.

A-harvard-cs153-cfg-dataflow.relevance-description: CFG construction + dataflow, lecture form (Chong, Harvard CS153; offering-year not stamped in the deck). Learning path.
